name: @pyreon/native-router-kotlin
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Kotlin runtime implementing @pyreon/router's API surface (RouterProvider / RouterView / PyreonLink / useNavigate / useParams) for Android Compose. Parallel to @pyreon/native-router-swift. Phase C2 of the PMTC multiplatform router story.

scripts.build: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts; else echo '[native-router-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping build (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts; else echo '[native-router-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping test (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.lint: echo '[native-router-kotlin] Kotlin lint (detekt/ktlint) not yet integrated; skipping lint'
scripts.typecheck: if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo '[native-router-kotlin] skipping typecheck in CI — kotlinc cold-start + parallel-load timeouts; covered by scripts/verify-kotlin.ts which runs locally per-PR'; elif command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --typecheck-only; else echo '[native-router-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping typecheck'; fi
